name: Cursed Bride Doll
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>離</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ハナ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>世</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヨ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>召</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>メ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ニン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>形</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ギョウ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When you draw this card: You can reveal it; Special Summon this card. At the start of each Battle Phase: If there are more cards in your Deck than your opponent's, this card gains ATK equal to the difference x 300, until the end of this turn. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card is in the GY because it was sent there this turn: Place this card on top of the Deck.
mnst_eff: When you draw this card: You can reveal it; Special Summon this card. At the start of each Battle Phase: If there are more cards in your Deck than your opponent's, this card gains ATK equal to the difference x 300, until the end of this turn. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card is in the GY because it was sent there this turn: Place this card on top of the Deck.
eff: When you draw this card: You can reveal it; Special Summon this card. At the start of each Battle Phase: If there are more cards in your Deck than your opponent's, this card gains ATK equal to the difference x 300, until the end of this turn. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card is in the GY because it was sent there this turn: Place this card on top of the Deck.

action: Reveals itself in the hand for cost
Places itself from the player's Graveyard on the top of the Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
misc: At the start of the Battle Phase
